title: X-tra Dense Croatian Ragù Casserole
description: A hearty, cultural dish from Croatia featuring a dense and rich ragù filled with garlic and topped with a crispy spherified crust. Perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the caraway seeds, tomato paste, and beef broth to the pan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the canned diced tomatoes and chicken broth.
Add the cooked pasta to the ragù and stir to combine.
Transfer the ragù to a baking dish and top with grated parmesan.
If using spherified milk powder, sprinkle it over the parmesan.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
